title: Local installation standards preempted
doc_html:
§912.26. Local installation standards preempted

            The manufactured and modular home installation standards provided for in this Part shall preempt all local installation standards.

            Acts 1997, No. 970, §1; Acts 2001, No. 718, §2; Acts 2017, No. 221, §1.
doc_text:
§912.26.  Local installation standards preempted
The manufactured and modular home installation standards provided for in this Part
shall preempt all local installation standards.
Acts 1997, No. 970, §1; Acts 2001, No. 718, §2; Acts 2017, No. 221, §1.
